nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.comment: Accepts JSON: { message, model (optional), temperature (optional), max_tokens (optional), channel (optional) }. API key via X-API-Key header only.

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.comment: Validates: API key auth (header only - X-API-Key), model name, message length, temperature (0.0-2.0), max_tokens (100-4096), channel name. All error returns include valid: false. Success returns valid: true.

nodes.name: Check Valid
nodes.comment: Branch based on validation result. True = valid input, continue to API. False = validation/auth failed, route to error.

nodes.name: Validation Error
nodes.comment: Sends error notification for validation failures.

nodes.name: Discord Output
nodes.comment: Sends response to Discord webhook. Truncates to 1800 chars to stay under Discord's 2000 char limit.

nodes.name: Discord Error
nodes.comment: Sends error notification from API call failures.
